Trying webr.    
Note: no packages are loaded, so only base operations should be executable.    Otherwise you might get a missing package dependency error :(

Create a numeric variable


```{webr-r}
#| label: use-webr
#| echo: true
#| eval: true
a <- 3
b <- 5
a+b
```
